title: helichrysum aurantiacum
intro: Helichrysum aurantiacum, also known as the Orange Mountain Everlasting, is a perennial herb native to South Africa, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Helichrysum aurantiacum lie in its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which are commonly used to treat wounds, reduce pain, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Helichrysum aurantiacum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which are used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
